text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee, hehe! ♪ Oh, hello, Trainer. A good
morning to you.
choice_data_list: Rising and shining today, I see.
Rising and shining today, I see.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee! I used my gratefully received time off to
enjoy a picnic with Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We had a relaxing time out in the sunshine. We
caught up, enjoyed a lovely lunch, and even hit
the gym together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My time off was rewarding indeed. Thank you
very much. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm ready to undertake any training regimen
you have in mind for me. Just say the word and
off we go. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright comes back from her time off
refreshed and motivated!
